name: olojiang-demo
description: Demo marketplace showcasing Claude Code plugin types: skills, commands, agents, and hooks

plugins.name: hello-skill
plugins.description: A simple skill that says hello

plugins.name: greet-command
plugins.description: A command to greet people with custom messages

plugins.name: code-explainer
plugins.description: A demo sub-agent that explains code in a beginner-friendly way, with a /explain command

plugins.name: todo-reminder
plugins.description: A demo hook that reminds about TODO/FIXME comments when writing or editing files

plugins.name: pinefield-memories
plugins.description: Long-term memory system with auto-recall hooks, AI-powered memorization, and session archiving

plugins.name: pinefield-scheduler
plugins.description: Cron-based task scheduler with MCP tools for creating, listing, and deleting scheduled tasks

plugins.name: physical-boss-hub
plugins.description: Device/Person registry with autonomous PM2 workers, channel-based delegation, and AI-powered task execution

plugins.name: kimi-search
plugins.description: Web search powered by Kimi (Moonshot AI) built-in $web_search capability
